gts 0.2.9019
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Joining gridded environmental data to spatiotemporal observations
  • Changelog

Package index

Get started

gts() read_gts()
Create a gridded time-series object
read_static()
Read a static gridded object from a netCDF file
make_grid() update_grid() read_grid()
Create or read a spatial grid object
gts-class
Gridded time-series objects
static-class
Static gridded objects
grid-class
Spatial grid objects

Inspect gridded objects

is.na(<gts>) is.na(<static>) dim(<gts>) dim(<static>) dim(<grid>) print(<gts>) print(<static>) print(<grid>) names(<gts>) names(<static>) `names<-`(<gts>) `names<-`(<static>) units(<gts>) units(<static>) `units<-`(<gts>) `units<-`(<static>) str(<gts>) str(<static>) is_climatology()
Inspect and modify gridded objects
resolution()
Compute the spatial resolution of a gridded object
print(<gts.resolution>)
Print a spatial resolution summary

Coordinates and spatial helpers

longitude() latitude() `longitude<-`()
Extract or modify horizontal coordinates of gridded objects
transform_coordinates()
Transform coordinates between coordinate reference systems
is_ocean() is_land() is_over()
Classify points relative to land, ocean, or a polygon layer
area()
Compute the area of grid cells
mask() `mask<-`()
Extract, create, or assign spatial masks

Grid processing and interpolation

interpolate()
Interpolate bivariate data on grids or point locations
regrid()
Regrid a gridded object to a new spatial grid
fill()
Fill missing values in gridded objects
subset(<gts>) subset(<grid>) subset(<static>)
Subset gridded objects

Time series and temporal analysis

time(<gts>) frequency(<gts>) deltat(<gts>) start(<gts>) end(<gts>) cycle(<gts>) window(<gts>)
Time-series methods for `gts` objects
climatology()
Compute climatologies from gridded time-series objects
mean(<gts>) mean(<static>) sum(<gts>) sum(<static>) as.double(<gts>) as.double(<static>) sd()
Summarise and extract values from gridded objects
quantile(<gts>)
Quantiles of a gridded time-series object
stl_array()
Seasonal Decomposition of Gridded Time Series
stl_array2()
Seasonal Decomposition of Gridded Time Series
integrate()
Integrate functions and gridded time-series objects
vertical_integration() locate()
Vertical integration and level location for gridded profiles

Mathematical operations

Math(<gts>) Math(<static>) log(<gts>) log(<static>) Math2(<gts>) Math2(<static>) chooseOpsMethod(<gts>) chooseOpsMethod(<static>) Ops(<gts>) Ops(<static>) Summary(<gts>) Summary(<static>)
Mathematical operations for gridded objects
slog()
Signed logarithmic transform

Reshape, merge, and export

c(<gts>) melt(<gts>) melt(<static>) drop()
Combine and reshape gridded objects
merge_gts() merge(<data.frame>,<gts>)
Merge point records with a gridded time-series object
write_ncdf(<gts>) write_ncdf(<static>) write_ncdf(<grid>)
Write gridded objects to a netCDF file

Plotting and maps

plot(<gts>) plot(<static>) plot(<grid>)
Plot gridded objects
image_map()
Draw an image plot with geographical coordinates and coastlines.
map.axes2()
Add geographical axes to a map
map_details()
Add details to a map

Utilities

compact_gam()
Compact a GAM or GLM object

On this page

Developed by Ricardo Oliveros-Ramos.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
